round_detection_note: Rounds are identified by anchor phrases in the PDF: 'Hi Mr - Notes May 1st' marks start of May 1 round (~p.2 mid); 'Monty Updated Feedback: April 30' marks start of April 30 round (~p.6 mid). May 5 is everything before the May 1 anchor. PDF layered chronologically (newest first) per CONTEXT.md.

bullets.verbatim: may 5th notes good morning Monty! landing page in the bar with the number of houses, bedrooms, bathrooms, and guests, please change the word houses to homes so it reads three homes in gathering and dining spaces, can you please format it so the pictures are full-size and there’s no white space with text to the right of the pictures?

I asked you to simplify the fonts - they still are italicizing the final word on headers for example: where you can stay Les Autre Maisons moulin a reves i still cant x out on my laptop from photos- i can from cell the white text is duplicative - we say same info 3 ways I asked you to change the name of house to le moulin instead of moulin a reves the grounds - each of the 3 images should be a clickable gallery footer of moulin page this house sleeps 10 not 12 — replace when you can stay at the footer with “join us!” also - i gave the note before to have one font - no italics on the word stay Hollywood hideaway - thru the looking glass- this formatting works well! the text is duplicate in triple other rooms dont work the garden should be a gallery get in touch remove italics text on hero photo change when you can stay to “Join us!” (I gave you this note before) getting here: please improve directions - this wasnt addressed
